_comment: Cloak shader: up to 16 reference colors (texels near any are recolored). avoidColors: up to 16 — mask reduced so skin/metal stay vanilla.
_comment_avoidRadius: Optional; if omitted, defaults to matchRadius. Same 0.02–1.0 range as matchRadius.
_comment_mapIcon: When true, logs SSMP compass/map-icon sync (without cloak scanner noise unless debugLogging is on).
_comment_scanner: CloakSceneScanner (orphan tk2d sprites only): an orphan matches if at least one non-empty list has a case-insensitive substring hit — OR between collectionNameContains (tk2d collection name), textureNameContains (Texture.name, often atlas0), transformPathContains (full GameObject path). Silksong.AssetHelper does not publish a full Hornet player atlas list; use DebugTools.DumpAllAssetNames / bundle asset dumps and grep, or run with debugLogging to log collection= / paths, then add substrings here. No registry or other heuristics.
_comment_heroMesh: CloakRecolor re-scans the player MeshRenderer list every N frames; material re-apply is still every LateUpdate.
_comment_dump: First time an atlas is registered from the hero hierarchy, dump PNG to BepInEx/plugins/HornetCloakColor/TextureDumps/ when true.
